desc.en: Learning from demonstrations and labeled data after pretraining.
desc.zh: 预训练之后,从示范数据与标注数据中学习。

desc.en: Teaching models to follow natural-language instructions across tasks.
desc.zh: 教模型跨任务地遵循自然语言指令。

desc.en: Adapting large models by training a small fraction of parameters (LoRA, adapters, prefix/prompt tuning).
desc.zh: 只训练极少量参数来适配大模型(LoRA、Adapter、前缀/提示微调)。

desc.en: Constructing, selecting, and synthesizing instruction/alignment data.
desc.zh: 构造、筛选与合成指令/对齐数据。

desc.en: Transferring capabilities (especially reasoning) from stronger to smaller models.
desc.zh: 将能力(尤其是推理)从更强的模型迁移到更小的模型。

desc.en: Optimizing model behavior against reward or preference signals.
desc.zh: 针对奖励或偏好信号来优化模型行为。

desc.en: Learning outcome and process reward models that score responses or reasoning steps.
desc.zh: 学习对回答或推理步骤打分的结果/过程奖励模型。

desc.en: Online RL algorithms optimizing a policy against a learned reward model.
desc.zh: 针对已学习奖励模型来优化策略的在线 RL 算法。

desc.en: RL-free methods that optimize preferences directly (DPO, IPO, KTO, SimPO, ORPO).
desc.zh: 无需 RL 循环、直接优化偏好的方法(DPO、IPO、KTO、SimPO、ORPO)。

desc.en: Using AI-generated feedback and principles in place of human labels.
desc.zh: 用 AI 生成的反馈与原则替代人工标注。

name.zh: 推理 RL / 可验证奖励

desc.en: RL with verifiable/rule-based rewards for reasoning (GRPO, DeepSeek-R1, RLVR).
desc.zh: 面向推理、使用可验证/规则奖励的 RL(GRPO、DeepSeek-R1、RLVR)。

desc.en: Spending more compute at inference to improve reasoning quality.
desc.zh: 在推理阶段投入更多算力以提升推理质量。

desc.en: Prompting and training for explicit multi-step reasoning and long CoT.
desc.zh: 通过提示与训练激发显式多步推理与长思维链。

desc.en: Guiding generation with tree/graph search and MCTS.
desc.zh: 用树/图搜索与 MCTS 引导生成。

desc.en: Surveys, benchmarks, safety research, and open-source tooling.
desc.zh: 综述、基准、安全研究与开源工具。

desc.en: Comprehensive reviews of post-training, reasoning, and alignment.
desc.zh: 关于后训练、推理与对齐的综合性综述。

desc.en: Evaluation benchmarks and datasets for reasoning and alignment.
desc.zh: 面向推理与对齐的评测基准与数据集。

desc.en: Safety alignment, guardrails, and robustness of reasoning models.
desc.zh: 推理模型的安全对齐、护栏与鲁棒性。

desc.en: Open-source frameworks and libraries for post-training and RL fine-tuning.
desc.zh: 用于后训练与 RL 微调的开源框架与代码库。
